experienceText: Experience premium media playback without buffering. Optimized for all high-end Smart TVs.
disclaimerText1: Wiseplayer is an independent multimedia player application. We are not affiliated with unauthorized websites using our brand to sell IPTV services. We do not provide, host, or sell any multimedia content, subscription, or channel package.
disclaimerPoint1: Wiseplayer does not provide or provide any audiovisual content to users.
disclaimerPoint2: We have no official link with third-party content providers.
disclaimerPoint3: Users are solely responsible for providing their own media and playlist files.
disclaimerPoint4: We are strictly not engaged in the sale or distribution of IPTV subscriptions.
feature1Desc: C++ engine optimized for ultra-fast loading.
feature2Desc: Management of encrypted playlist for your private viewing.
feature3Desc: Support for true 4K and 8K resolution for OLED screens.
price_standard_desc: Access for 1 year to the WisePlayer multimedia player.
price_pro_desc: Pay once and enjoy all future updates forever.
faq_mac_answer: Currently, Wiseplayer is primarily optimized for Smart TVs (Android TV, Fire TV, Samsung Tizen, LG WebOS). We are constantly working to expand compatibility, so check back for Mac support updates!
faq_transfer_answer: Yes, the Pro license can be transferred once. Please contact our customer support to arrange this.
footerBrandText: WisePlayer does not provide any multimedia content. Users must supply their own playlist files. We are a professional multimedia player tool designed for the ultimate experience.
footer_copyright: Wiseplayer Management Portal. All rights reserved.
act_banner: No content / channels included — Player license only.
act_subtitle: Enter your MAC address to get started
act_mac_hint: Find it in device Settings → Network → About
act_agree_text: I confirm I have my own content and I am paying for the
reseller_title: DO YOU WANT TO BECOME A RESELLER?
reseller_desc: If so, then you are at the right place. Our team offers you the opportunity to become a license reseller of our application. Manage and activate your customers' subscriptions easily with your own reseller panel.
pricing_subtitle: Flexible pricing for customers and resellers
bonus_msg: Bonus codes may be included for large orders
whatsapp_msg: Orders above 1000 codes require WhatsApp contact
recover_subtitle: We'll send a recovery link to your username contact.
contact_sub: We’re here to assist you with any technical issues, billing inquiries, or feedback.
contact_secure_desc: Your data is safe with us.
contact_brand_msg: Elevate your streaming experience with our premium services.
contact_msg_placeholder: How can we help you today?
contact_success_msg: We'll gets back to you soon.
tfs_hero_sub: WisePlayer: Always On, Always Wise. Whether it's a 3 AM marathon or a midday binge, we are online whenever you are.
tfs_feat1_desc: No maintenance breaks. Your prime time is whenever you hit play.
tfs_feat2_desc: Access movies, shows, and live feeds from around the world.
tfs_feat3_desc: Support for 4K HDR playback with optimized high-speed servers.
tfs_feat4_desc: Fastest response time for live broadcasts and sports.
tfs_cta_sub: Compatible with Android, iOS, Web, and Smart TVs. Join thousands of users today.
tfs_support_sub: We match our service with expert support.
sec_hero_sub: Security isn't an option; it's our foundation. Watch what you want, knowing you are 100% invisible.
sec_footer_sub: Your data is safe with us.
manage_end_users: Manage end users and their activity
credits_desc: Purchase credits and unlock premium features. Flexible plans designed for both users and resellers.
logout_confirmation: Are you sure you want to logout?
